MP-2.manual_guidance: Review media storage and handling procedures for both paper and digital media containing CUI. Verify physical security controls for media storage areas including locked cabinets, access logs, and environmental protections.
evidence_requests: Physical security controls for media storage
Access logs for media storage areas

objectives_requiring_documentation.text: paper media containing CUI is physically controlled.
objectives_requiring_documentation.evidence_needed: Provide physical security evidence: paper media containing CUI is physically controlled.

objectives_requiring_documentation.text: digital media containing CUI is physically controlled.
objectives_requiring_documentation.evidence_needed: Provide physical security evidence: digital media containing CUI is physically controlled.

objectives_requiring_documentation.text: paper media containing CUI is securely stored.
objectives_requiring_documentation.evidence_needed: Provide documentation or process evidence: paper media containing CUI is securely stored.

objectives_requiring_documentation.text: digital media containing CUI is securely stored.
objectives_requiring_documentation.evidence_needed: Provide documentation or process evidence: digital media containing CUI is securely stored.

aws.name: S3 bucket policies restrict CUI access
aws.expected: S3 buckets containing CUI have explicit deny for unauthorized principals
aws.remediation: Configure S3 bucket policies to restrict access to authorized IAM principals.

aws.name: EBS volumes encrypted
aws.expected: All EBS volumes are encrypted with KMS keys
aws.remediation: Enable EBS encryption by default and encrypt existing unencrypted volumes.

aws.name: EBS default encryption enabled
aws.expected: EBS encryption by default enabled in all regions
aws.remediation: Enable EBS encryption by default in all active regions.

azure.name: Storage account access restricted
azure.expected: Storage accounts use private endpoints or service endpoints only
azure.remediation: Configure storage accounts with private endpoints and restrict public access.

azure.name: Managed disk encryption enabled
azure.expected: All managed disks use platform or customer-managed encryption
azure.remediation: Ensure all managed disks use Azure Disk Encryption or server-side encryption.

gcp.name: Cloud Storage bucket access restricted
gcp.expected: Buckets containing CUI restrict access to authorized principals only
gcp.remediation: Configure bucket IAM policies to restrict access to authorized users and services.

gcp.name: Persistent disk encryption with CMEK
gcp.expected: All persistent disks use customer-managed encryption keys
gcp.remediation: Encrypt persistent disks with customer-managed encryption keys (CMEK).

MP-6.manual_guidance: Review media sanitization procedures and destruction records. Verify NIST SP 800-88 compliant sanitization methods (Clear, Purge, or Destroy) are used based on media type and security categorization. Check disposal vendor certifications and certificates of destruction.
evidence_requests: Media sanitization procedures aligned with NIST 800-88
Certificates of destruction for disposed media

objectives_requiring_documentation.text: system media containing CUI is sanitized or destroyed before disposal.
objectives_requiring_documentation.evidence_needed: Provide documentation or process evidence: system media containing CUI is sanitized or destroyed before disposal.

objectives_requiring_documentation.text: system media containing CUI is sanitized before it is released for reuse.
objectives_requiring_documentation.evidence_needed: Provide documentation or process evidence: system media containing CUI is sanitized before it is released for reuse.

MP-6(1).manual_guidance: Verify CUI marking procedures exist and are followed. Check that digital and physical media containing CUI are marked with appropriate CUI designations (CUI//SP-CTI, CUI//ITAR, etc.) and distribution statements.
evidence_requests: Sample marked media (digital headers/footers, physical labels)
CUI category and marking reference guide

objectives_requiring_documentation.text: media containing CUI is marked with applicable CUI markings.
objectives_requiring_documentation.evidence_needed: Provide documentation or process evidence: media containing CUI is marked with applicable CUI markings.

objectives_requiring_documentation.text: media containing CUI is marked with distribution limitations.
objectives_requiring_documentation.evidence_needed: Provide documentation or process evidence: media containing CUI is marked with distribution limitations.

MP-3.manual_guidance: Review media transport procedures and chain-of-custody records. Verify encryption requirements for media in transit, tamper-evident packaging requirements, and accountability tracking from origin to destination.

objectives_requiring_documentation.text: access to media containing CUI is controlled.
objectives_requiring_documentation.evidence_needed: Provide documentation or process evidence: access to media containing CUI is controlled.

objectives_requiring_documentation.text: accountability for media containing CUI is maintained during transport outside of controlled areas.
objectives_requiring_documentation.evidence_needed: Provide documentation or process evidence: accountability for media containing CUI is maintained during transport outside of controlled areas.

aws.name: S3 buckets encrypted with KMS
aws.expected: All S3 buckets use SSE-KMS or SSE-S3 encryption
aws.remediation: Enable default encryption with KMS on all S3 buckets.

aws.name: RDS instances encrypted
aws.remediation: Enable encryption on all RDS instances (requires recreation for existing unencrypted).

aws.name: EFS file systems encrypted
aws.expected: Encrypted=true on all EFS file systems
aws.remediation: Enable encryption on EFS file systems at creation time.

azure.name: Storage accounts enforce encryption
azure.expected: All storage accounts use Microsoft-managed or customer-managed encryption keys
azure.remediation: Azure Storage is encrypted by default; verify customer-managed keys for CUI data.

azure.name: SQL Database TDE enabled
azure.expected: Transparent Data Encryption enabled on all SQL databases
azure.remediation: Enable TDE on all Azure SQL databases.

gcp.name: Cloud Storage buckets use CMEK
gcp.expected: Buckets containing CUI use customer-managed encryption keys
gcp.remediation: Configure Cloud Storage buckets with CMEK via Cloud KMS.

gcp.name: Cloud SQL instances encrypted
gcp.expected: All Cloud SQL instances use customer-managed encryption keys
gcp.remediation: Configure Cloud SQL instances with CMEK encryption.

MP-7.manual_guidance: Review removable media policies and endpoint DLP configurations. Verify USB device restrictions, authorized device whitelists, and logging of removable media connections to systems processing CUI.

objectives_requiring_documentation.text: the use of removable media on system components containing CUI is controlled.
objectives_requiring_documentation.evidence_needed: Provide documentation or process evidence: the use of removable media on system components containing CUI is controlled.

MP-7(1).manual_guidance: Review portable storage device policies. Verify that all authorized portable storage devices are registered, assigned to specific individuals, and tracked. Confirm that unidentified/unregistered devices are not permitted on CUI systems.
evidence_requests: Policy for handling unidentified storage devices

objectives_requiring_documentation.text: the use of portable storage devices is prohibited when such devices have no identifiable owner.
objectives_requiring_documentation.evidence_needed: Provide documentation or process evidence: the use of portable storage devices is prohibited when such devices have no identifiable owner.

aws.name: Backup vault encrypted with KMS
aws.expected: All backup vaults use KMS encryption
aws.remediation: Configure AWS Backup vaults with KMS encryption.

aws.name: Backup vault access policy restricts access
aws.expected: Backup vault access policies restrict access to authorized roles
aws.remediation: Configure backup vault access policies to restrict access.

aws.name: S3 cross-region replication encrypted
aws.expected: Cross-region replication uses KMS encryption for replicated objects
aws.remediation: Configure S3 replication rules to use KMS encryption for destination.

azure.name: Recovery Services vault encrypted
azure.expected: All Recovery Services vaults use platform or customer-managed encryption
azure.remediation: Configure Recovery Services vaults with appropriate encryption settings.

azure.name: Backup vault soft delete enabled
azure.expected: Soft delete enabled on all backup vaults to protect against deletion
azure.remediation: Enable soft delete on Recovery Services vaults.

gcp.name: Backup encrypted with CMEK
gcp.expected: Backup vaults use customer-managed encryption keys
gcp.remediation: Configure backup vaults with CMEK encryption.
